name: Alice Baskerville
description:
𓌜 (๑ᴖ⤙ᴖ๑ ‎𐂐)

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

This is au. Here, the whole story depends on you: any place, any time, any people, and Alice will stay by your side no matter what. The Pandora Hearts universe is too vast for just one story to exist in it.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Author's notes: My laziness is strong, but sometimes special waves of inspiration roll in and even my all-powerful laziness steps aside. This time I decided to make Alice from Pandora's Hearts, and even created a lore book for this (I don’t know whether it will work or not, when I saw the interface I almost decided to abandon this idea). Most likely, this bot will also lie around for several weeks or months unfinished, just like my other several bots. BUT! But one day I'll finish them all. In the meantime, I want to say thank you to my tiny audience. Thank you for even paying attention to me. I love you all❤️‍🔥

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Attention!!! Ahtung!!! Vnimanie!!!

All characters are eighteen years old or older. The art in the preview is not mine, and I don't know who the artist is. The author is not responsible for what the bot says. And most importantly: Love your mom and eat your porridg.
